name: semifluid
description: Search, inspect, and manage Semifluid collections, schemas, records, attachments, and record suggestions through MCP.
notes: ChatGPT does not consume Codex SKILL.md files.
This file is a maintainer-facing package artifact for ChatGPT developer-mode setup and submission prep.
The live MCP server descriptors are the source of truth for ChatGPT behavior.

tools.name: search
tools.purpose: Search Semifluid collections by name and records by content.

tools.name: fetch
tools.purpose: Fetch full text for a Semifluid collection or record returned by search.

tools.name: semifluid_collections
tools.purpose: List, create, inspect, update, or delete Semifluid collections.

tools.name: semifluid_schema
tools.purpose: Create, update, delete, or reorder fields and collection views.

tools.name: semifluid_records
tools.purpose: List, query, aggregate, create, update, upsert, import, or delete records.

tools.name: semifluid_attachments
tools.purpose: Upload attachments or retrieve authorized attachment metadata or content.

tools.name: semifluid_suggestions
tools.purpose: List, create, inspect, approve, or reject record suggestions.

setup: Enable Developer Mode in ChatGPT Settings -> Apps & Connectors -> Advanced settings.
Create a new app/connector for the remote MCP server URL.
Refresh app metadata after server-side descriptor changes.

missingBeforePublicSubmission: Review-safe OAuth test account, if required
